title: Bump harness-schemas v0.1.0 → v0.2.0 adding sessionSchemaRefs + deploymentSchemaRefs
description: Promote session/deployment schema references from ad-hoc identity.extensions to first-class optional fields on HarnessAspectDoc. Design locked: two parallel optional fields. Add to schema-universal/private/universal/domain/system/schema-families/harness-schemas/v0.2.0/spm/harness-schemas-v000-002-000/Sources/HarnessSchemas_v000_002_000/HarnessModel.swift: `public var sessionSchemaRefs: [SchemaFamilyRef]?` (for session-hosting harnesses) and `public var deploymentSchemaRefs: [SchemaFamilyRef]?` (for factory/mint carriers like digikoma). Update HarnessSchemaVersion.current = "0.2.0". Add SchemaFamilyRef struct if not already present (family: String, version: String). Mirror v0.1.0 directory wholesale, find/replace v000_001 → v000_002 in module name + Package.swift, bump schemaVersion constant, author migrator under schema-migrators/. Then update core-entity-set freshness audit binding to harness-schemas v0.2.0.
